headline: AI Chip Leader Flashes Strength Amid War Turmoil
summary: Tuesday's selection for IBD 50 Stocks To Watch – remains above its 50-day moving average after a round-trip sell signal.  On Monday, the AI stock posted a third straight loss after hitting an all-time high of 1,256.22 last week.  Monolithic Power's power products are used in telecommunications and enterprise cloud, both of which are critical to artificial intelligence data centers.

headline: Dow Jones Restaurant Giant McDonald's, Alcoa In Or Near Buy Zones Amid Stock Market Sell-Off
